title: Tax exemption
doc_html:
§338.74.  Tax exemption

All bonds issued under the provisions of R.S. 47:338.48 through 338.78 shall be exempt from taxation.

Acts 1957, No. 50, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 33:2730 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §4.
doc_text:
§338.74.  Tax exemption
All bonds issued under the provisions of R.S. 47:338.48 through 338.78 shall be exempt from taxation.
Acts 1957, No. 50, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 33:2730 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §4.
